title: The King's Secret
description: The witch has been exposed, but a greater mystery remains - where is the true King? The elven elder spoke of the King's obsession with immortality and his journey to the elven lands nearly fifty years ago seeking a legendary 'Chamber of Immortality'. The secret society believes the King may still be alive, trapped by his own desire to live forever.

objectives.description: Research the legend of the Chamber of Immortality
Find an elf who knows the path to the Chamber
Navigate the ancient dungeon to find the Chamber
